prompt: A refined ancient Chinese poster design on warm ivory textured paper, minimalist editorial layout with large areas of negative space and a museum-catalog feel. The composition centers on the Chinese idiom 大丈夫當如是 rendered in bold, expressive black ink brush calligraphy, arranged vertically in 5 large characters on the left-center. On the right side, place a tall vertical line of elegant metallic-gold Chinese characters reading 彼可取而代之. In the center-right, feature a monumental dark bronze archaic ceremonial frame shaped like a squared jade bi or hooked rectangular ring, with weathered patina, heavy texture, rounded inner corners, and a stylized beast-head carving at the upper left corner. Inside the hollow opening of the bronze object, show a small misty historical landscape in pale grayscale ink wash: distant mountains, open plain, and a single upright flag on a pole with tattered cloth blowing in the wind. At the bottom center, place 1 separate bronze ritual vessel with two upright handles, squat rounded body, taotie-inspired relief patterns, and aged green-brown patina. Add multiple columns of small vertical Chinese annotation text around the composition like a scholarly exhibit poster: 1 thin vertical seasonal note on the far left, 1 compact vertical philosophical quote block at the upper right, 1 small vertical commentary block beside the main calligraphy, 1 lower-left source/explanation text block, and 1 lower-right era/culture text block. Include 4 small red seal stamps total placed in different areas, plus 1 tiny gold dragon emblem near the lower middle. Add subtle printed credit text at the bottom right reading DESIGNER : A CHIH. Color palette is off-white paper, matte black ink, dark oxidized bronze, muted grayscale landscape, antique gold typography, and cinnabar red seals. Lighting is soft and diffuse, flat poster presentation, straight-on view, ultra-clean high-end cultural graphic design, blending Song-dynasty aesthetics, calligraphy exhibition poster, bronzeware archaeology, and luxury editorial typography.
